summary: SINGLE_FOCUS blockchain of 4 blocks drawn as SurroundingRectangle + VGroup of Tex lines (prev-hash, data, hash). Hashes computed via real hashlib.sha256 on prev||content. GREY_B Arrows link block_i to block_{i+1} via GrowArrow. Tampering: Transform the data of block 2 (RED); each downstream block's hash is recomputed and Transform-swapped in RED along with its SurroundingRectangle, and the next block's prev-hash Tex is also updated — the whole tail turns RED. Verdict caption: 'every downstream block is invalidated'.
